subject: Gine, a female Saiyan with short dark hair wearing a teal battle outfit with pink accents, standing in a rocky outdoor landscape
suspected_ip: Gine (Dragon Ball Minus / Dragon Ball Super: Broly)
description: A female Saiyan figure with short dark hair stands in a rocky, barren landscape. She wears a teal battle outfit layered over a dark pink-magenta undershirt, with the sleeves rolled up or cut short. Her expression is warm and gentle despite the battle outfit — an unusual softness for a Saiyan warrior card. Rocky outcroppings and a pink-tinged sky fill the background. Her posture is relaxed and grounded rather than combative. This card image emphasizes her protective, family-oriented identity rather than her warrior role.
foreground: female Saiyan in teal outfit and pink undershirt, short dark hair, relaxed stance
background: rocky barren landscape with pink-tinged sky
emotion: warm, gentle, protective — a fighter with a tender expression
